name: Gentle Bounce Pillow 18x28
description: Experience pleasing comport with the Gentle Bounce Pillow, designed for softness. It absorbs and wicks away moisture for a relaxing feel.

name: Uratex Trill Hybrid Mattress
description: The Trill Hybrid Mattress by Uratex is a 10-inch thick bed combining soft memory foam and supportive pocket springs. It features premium knitted fabric. CertiPUR-US certified foam, and comes in a convenient box for easy setup.

name: Uratex Comport Plus Mattress
description: The Comport Plus Mattress offer the perfect balance of support and comport with a thick polycotton cover. Made with CertiPUR-US certified foam for durability and quality.

name: Uratex Trill Regal Mattress
description: Experience comfort and undisturbed sleep with our pocket spring mattress, offering medium-firm support for all body types. Made with CertiPUR-US certified foam for lasting quality and durability.

name: Uratex Trill Air Mattress
description: The Trill Air mattress offers breathable comport with convoluted foam for airflow and even weight distribution,plus soft knitted fabric for a small feel. Made with CertiPUR-US certified foam for lasting quality and durability.

name: Uratex Airline Wind Mattress
description: The Uratex Airlite Wind uses Sleep Cool. Technology and 3D Spacer fabric for cool, breathable sleep.Made with CertiPUR-US certified foam for lasting quality and durability.
